title: hackelia stricta
intro: Hackelia stricta, also known as sticky geranium or sticky blue geranium, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots are commonly used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
